message:
fix: correctness fixes across net, cancel, bracket, process, sqlite, encoding, vclock

net/dns/lookup: Use saturating_sub in HappyEyeballs::remaining() to
prevent underflow when internal indices exceed vec lengths during
concurrent resolution.

net/unix/stream: Rewrite connect_abstract to use socket2::SockAddr::unix()
with NUL-prefixed path instead of Linux-only SocketAddrExt::from_abstract_
name, improving portability. Add listener interop test.

net/tcp/split: Refactor if-let to is_some_and() for conciseness.

cancel/symbol_cancel: Wrap each listener callback in catch_unwind() during
SymbolCancelToken::cancel() so a single panicking listener cannot prevent
remaining listeners and child token cancellation from executing.

combinator/bracket: Handle resource_for_release being Some during the
Acquiring phase (use_fn panicked during transition). Catch panics from
release_fn itself and from individual polls of the release future during
drop to prevent resource leaks.

process: Best-effort try_wait() after kill() in Child::drop to reap the
child and avoid zombie processes on Unix systems.

database/sqlite: Only mark transaction finished=true after successful
COMMIT/ROLLBACK execution, not before. A cancelled commit now correctly
leaves finished=false so Drop can enqueue a best-effort rollback.

encoding: Cast k as f64 directly instead of through u32 to avoid
truncation for source block counts exceeding u32::MAX.

vclock: Reset logical counter to 0 in HybridClock::now() when physical
time advances, rather than always reporting the stale logical value.

decoding: Formatting fixes for range cast and seed initialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
